title: Backend Developer Vacancy at iGate India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at iGate India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at iGate India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Hyderabad-based team.

About iGate India:
iGate India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Microservices

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with iGate India!
